reviews.review_description: So I love this game whoever made is awesome but what’s not awesome is I got banned but it’s my fault kinda also NOT TELLING STORY! And like I said just a game a chill guy would play and the best game ever like I said definitely download it!🙏🙏🙏

reviews.review_title: Best Gorila tag fan game ever ABSOLUTE!!
reviews.review_description:
Absolute cinema, the game was fun and pretty well made. This can become the next gorilla tag 2
 ￼good . CHICKEN JOCKY!!!!

￼

this is my friends VR  game, so I don’t want this to sound biased. He is a solo developer and somehow made this masterpiece by himself, definitely recommend this game if you like just running around and having fun.

It’s a fun game I play with my friends. It’s very fun and I’m not just saying that because I’m the owner I’m releasing￼ update soon. ￼
￼
